subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — it's great to hear from you, and we're genuinely excited about the potential synergy you've described.

We'd be happy to set up an introductory call. Here are a few slots that work on our end:

  • Tuesday, April 21 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, April 22 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, April 23 — 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these works best for you and we'll get a calendar invite out right away.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm afraid we're not able to share internal personnel contact details. For general enquiries and to reach the right people, I'd recommend visiting our public website where you'll find the appropriate contact channels. Once we're on a call, we can make sure the right stakeholders are looped in from our side.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
agent@company.internal
